team.title: Team skill landscape
team.description: Anonymized counts only — never individual names. Suppressed below 3 direct reports.
team.privacyBody: Aggregate counts help you plan L&D. With fewer than 3 reports, this view is hidden to prevent trivial de-anonymization.
team.topGapsDesc: Skills your team most often wants to develop.
team.topStrengthsDesc: Skills your team most often offers to teach.
